CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, content VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (5, '  multiple   spaces  in   end   ');
SELECT id, rtrim(content) AS trimmed_content FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN rtrim(content) != content THEN 'Trimmed' ELSE 'Not Trimmed' END AS status FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE additional_strings (id INT, content VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO additional_strings VALUES (1, '   trailing   space   ');
SELECT a.id, rtrim(a.content) AS trimmed_content FROM test_strings a JOIN additional_strings b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT a.id, rtrim(CONCAT(a.content, ' ', b.content)) AS combined_trimmed FROM test_strings a, additional_strings b WHERE a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, rtrim(content) AS trimmed_content FROM (SELECT content FROM test_strings WHERE id > 1) AS subquery;
SELECT DISTINCT rtrim(content) AS unique_trimmed FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, rtrim(content) AS trimmed_content FROM test_strings WHERE rtrim(content) = 'noSpaces';
CREATE VIEW trimmed_view AS SELECT id, rtrim(content) AS trimmed_content FROM test_strings;
SELECT * FROM trimmed_view WHERE trimmed_content LIKE 'test';
SELECT id, rtrim(content), LENGTH(content) AS original_length, LENGTH(rtrim(content)) AS trimmed_length FROM test_strings;
